metadata.decision_question: Should the fictional LoopDose concept receive funding for a bounded market pilot?

criteria.criterion: Fits the sponsor's refill and reuse direction
Target households experience the stated storage problem
criteria.evidence_note: Twelve interviews plus a small concept survey

criteria.criterion: The concept is meaningfully different from current refills
The metered cap performs consistently across concentrates
Materials and instructions support safe intended use
Forward unit and project economics clear the hurdle
criteria.evidence_note: Supplier quotes and three demand cases

criteria.criterion: The team can source, fill, and support the launch
criteria.evidence_note: One supplier qualified; backup not qualified

criteria.criterion: The next spend buys evidence on the largest uncertainties
criteria.evidence_note: Bounded pilot plan with stop conditions

risks.risk: Concentrate damages a surface when instructions are ignored
risks.mitigation: Compatibility tests, clear exclusions, and packaging review
risks.trigger: Any severe pilot incident or repeated minor pattern
risks.response: Pause affected use case, investigate, and revise formula or instructions

risks.risk: Single cap supplier cannot hold metering tolerance
risks.mitigation: Tighten acceptance specification and qualify a second supplier
risks.response: Move volume to backup tooling and narrow supported concentrates

risks.risk: Retail placement produces less availability than planned
risks.mitigation: Run a limited channel pilot before national commitments
risks.response: Shift launch volume to direct and specialist channels

risks.risk: Repeat use is weaker than stated concept interest
risks.mitigation: Measure observed reuse and refill orders in the pilot
risks.response: Stop expansion and diagnose product experience before redesign

challenge.check: A relevant outside-view base rate has been documented
challenge.note: Compared with three recent refill launches available to the team

challenge.check: Evidence that could disconfirm the case has been recorded
challenge.note: Key counter-case: customers may prefer ready-to-use formats

challenge.check: Past spending has been excluded from the forward decision
challenge.note: All values use future cash flows only

challenge.check: A reviewer without delivery ownership has challenged the case
Every material forecast has a named assumption owner
challenge.note: Owners named in the assumptions file

challenge.check: The next commitment is bounded by a measurable learning milestone
challenge.note: Pilot budget and stop conditions drafted
